---
title: "Command Registration"
---

## Overview

TransformsV2 contributes commands to the shared `CommandRegistry` via an explicit
dispatcher function, following the same pattern as DataSynthesizer. Transform algorithm
registration (`ElementRegistry`) remains separate and uses static RAII registration with
`--whole-archive` linking.

**Source files:**

- `src/TransformsV2/register_transformsv2_commands.hpp` — public registration API
- `src/TransformsV2/register_transformsv2_commands.cpp` — dispatcher implementation
- `src/TransformsV2/Commands/` — future home for TransformsV2-owned `ICommand` types

## Dependency Direction

`TransformsV2` links `Commands` (PUBLIC). `Commands` does **not** link `TransformsV2`.
Application composition roots call `register_transformsv2_commands()` at startup alongside
`register_core_commands()` and other domain dispatchers.

## Call Sites

| Location | When |
|----------|------|
| `src/WhiskerToolbox/Main_Window/mainwindow.cpp` | GUI startup (`MainWindow` constructor) |
| `src/DataManagerPipelineRunner/main.cpp` | Headless JSON pipeline CLI |
| `tests/shared/RegisterCommandsListener.cpp` | Catch2 test binaries using commands |

`JsonPipelineRunner` in `DataManager` intentionally does **not** call this function — callers
that execute domain commands must register at their composition root.

## CMake

`TransformsV2` declares `target_link_libraries(TransformsV2 PUBLIC Commands)` in
`src/TransformsV2/CMakeLists.txt`. Consumers that call `register_transformsv2_commands()`
must link `TransformsV2` (e.g., `DataManagerPipelineRunner`, `test_commands`).

When a command delegates to `ElementRegistry` at runtime, consumers will also need
`--whole-archive` linking for `TransformsV2` (same as the GUI executable already does).

## Adding a Command

1. Create the command class under `src/TransformsV2/Commands/`.
2. Add a `registerTypedCommand<>` call in `register_transformsv2_commands.cpp`.
3. Add an idempotent guard (`if (reg.isKnown("CommandName")) return;`) once the first
   command is registered.

Planned first command: `RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime` —
[#267](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/267).

**Current status:** Registered as a **draft stub** — validates `pipeline_path`,
exposes browse UI for pipeline JSON, and logs parameters. Pipeline execution
and output merge are deferred to a follow-up PR.

See [RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime](../TransformsV2/Commands/RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime.qmd).

See also: [Command Registry](../Commands/command_registry.qmd).
